generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts national security at risk. The recent cyberattacks on critical infrastructure prove we can't afford to wait. Strategic autonomy isn't just about independence - it's about ensuring our allies can count on us when it matters most. #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyCalls
